chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR 1st. Civil Appeal No. D – 27 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case 3. For hearing of CMA No.777/2023 (S/A) 29.05.2024 Mr. Ashok Kumar K. Jamba, Advocate for Appellant Mr. Dareshani Ali Haider ‘Ada’, Deputy Attorney General for Pakistan >>>>>..<<<<< Learned Counsel, under instructions, does not press this appeal, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed along with listed application. Judge Judge ARBROHI
